title: Tanker market drivers
summary:
Main
Red Sea diversions - The predominant narrative revolved around the Houthi assaults on more than 80 commercial vessels in the Red Sea since the attacks began. A growing number of tankers opted to bypass the Red Sea altogether and take the significantly longer route around the Cape of Good Hope. This added approximately 30 days to a round voyage from the Middle East to Europe, according to AXS.
